V : Type u_1
inst✝ : Fintype V
G : SimpleGraph V
d : ℕ
hGcolorable : G.Colorable 2
hGdeg : ∀ (s : Finset V), (induce (↑s) G).edgeFinset.card ≤ d * s.card
⊢ ∃ r, Irreflexive r ∧ IsAsymm V r

proof: ⟨fun _ _ => False, fun _ h => h, ⟨fun _ _ h => h.elim⟩⟩

by

  refine ⟨fun u v => G.Adj u v ∧ c u < c v, fun v h => ?_, ⟨fun u v ⟨_, h⟩ ⟨_, h'⟩ => ?_⟩⟩
  · exact Nat.lt_irrefl _ h.2
  · exact Nat.lt_asymm h h'
